name: 4pc Christmas Pick Set 2 Flocked Cedar 2 Flocked Spruce - Wondershop™
description:
Bring nature-inspired whimsy to your Christmas decor with this 4-Piece Flocked Plant Pick Set. This set includes two faux flocked stems of cedar and spruce that resemble the real ones. Suitable for indoor and sheltered outdoor use, these stems can be used for floral arrangements, holiday centerpieces, festive table settings, Christmas tree decorations, winter wedding bouquets, and beyond.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
